title: Fix form reset clearing saved database records

requirements.summary: Fix form reset logic in all form modals to only clear local React form state without affecting Zustand store or persisted records
acceptanceCriteria: On page load, all form modals open with blank/default field values.
All previously saved records (purchase orders, suppliers, staff, shifts, expenses) remain visible and intact after page load.
Submitting a new record adds it to the existing list without removing prior entries.
The Zustand store seed data and any persisted records are not cleared or reset during form initialization.
No store actions that delete or overwrite collections (e.g., setState resetting arrays to empty) are called during form mount or page load.

file_operations.description: Review and fix the form reset logic to ensure that resetting form fields (e.g., in useEffect or on modal open) only clears the local React Hook Form state without calling any Zustand store actions that would delete or overwrite the purchase orders collection. Ensure form.reset() is scoped to local form state only.

Review and fix the form reset logic to ensure that resetting form fields (e.g., in useEffect or on modal open) only clears the local React Hook Form state without calling any Zustand store actions that would delete or overwrite the suppliers collection. Ensure form.reset() is scoped to local form state only.

Review and fix the form reset logic to ensure that resetting form fields (e.g., in useEffect or on modal open) only clears the local React Hook Form state without calling any Zustand store actions that would delete or overwrite the staff collection. Ensure form.reset() is scoped to local form state only.

Review and fix the form reset logic to ensure that resetting form fields (e.g., in useEffect or on modal open) only clears the local React Hook Form state without calling any Zustand store actions that would delete or overwrite the shifts collection. Ensure form.reset() is scoped to local form state only.

Review and fix the expense form reset logic (if the expense form is embedded directly in this page or managed via local state) to ensure that resetting form fields only clears local React form state without calling any Zustand store actions that would delete or overwrite the expenses collection.

Audit all store actions (addSupplier, updateSupplier, deleteSupplier, addPurchaseOrder, updatePurchaseOrderStatus, addStaff, updateStaff, deleteStaff, addShift, addExpense, etc.) to ensure none of them inadvertently reset or overwrite entire collections. Verify that seed data initialization does not run on every page load or form mount; it should only initialize once when the store is first created.
